calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment. Short Cause Trial. No appearance by Defendant(s).
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Brandon Tang, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant XIAOFEN HUANG.
Declaration of Maria Marin pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Portfolio Recovery Associates, LLC. and against Defendant Xiaofen Huang as follows:
Principal $1,023.38
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $531.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $1,554.38
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted
Off Calendar Jan-06-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted is denied. The address that is on the proofs of service for the discovery as well as the motion is not the same as the address on defendant's General Denial filed with the court. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro-tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/jpt

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Set For Trial On Mar-23-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted
Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF's PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion To Compel Response To Discovery, Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted is Off calendar. No courtesy copies of the moving papers were provided to the court despite a request by the Judge Pro Tem on Friday for copies of the papers. Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)
